top_signals.title: Inflation Is a Tailwind for European, Morgan Stanley Says
top_signals.summary: European equities stand to benefit from higher inflation, according to Morgan Stanley’s Marina Zavolock, who says the market underestimates the region’s exposure to sectors that profit from rising prices. "We have a lot of real asset exposure, we have banks exposure,” Zavolock, the firm’s chief European equity strategist, tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: The Tech Download: Teen social media bans miss a key part of the puzzle: AI chatbots
top_signals.summary: Teenagers are increasingly becoming dependent on AI chatbots, echoing a familiar problem with social media in the 2010s.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
